reviews.评论: When played with can cause harm.The wiring/boning for the Jessie doll‘s right arm somehow poked through the hole where her hat gets plugged into while my child was playing, and it scraped her face.  Not sure if this is common or a fluke but this is now too dangerous to play with, and we‘ll return.Ordered 4 months ago.
2 weeks after purchase the sound went out. Waste of money,  and this isn‘t cheap.

I just received Buzz this morning, and just opened it. The one I received isn’t working and there’s no manual whatsoever where the battery is located. Buzz’s chest has a small paint off of it as well as the tip of his left wing.

While we had high hopes our buzz doesn’t work. Even after replacing the batteries. There must be a short of some kind cause none of his buttons work. We however did not discover this until he was fully out of his box. No biggy just bummed as we got woody as well so they’d interact
Buzz Lightyear came defective, does not power on. I changed batteries and it doesn’t work.
Have purchased one before and it was fine .  Bought this for my grandson on Sept 11 and one month later it’s not talking.  He’s devestated !!!
Came not working.

reviews.标题: It’s fat, but kids don’t care
reviews.评论: Toy is stuffed too full, making it difficult to keep the battery/voice box in place within the Velcro pocket, also making the horse look a bit obese. But the kid it was given to seems to love it.

reviews.标题: Talks non stop even when you don‘t pull the string.
reviews.评论: ( Jesse Doll) This toy talks non stop until you turn it off or the batteries run out.  Even when you do not pull the string she talks and talks.  clearly something is defective.  It is a royal pain to access the sound maker battery and switch. Its a cute toy but it is pure junk as far as the sound maker goes.

reviews.标题: Toy didn‘t work and box was torn.
reviews.评论: The package was torn and it was taped back together and the toy didn‘t work. Looks like someone had opened it and then returned it. I wanted a replacement but there must be none in stock because it‘s been a week and no replacement yet.

reviews.标题: Not made to be played with
reviews.评论: Cool features but not very durable. Less than 24 hours after taking it out of the box, three different parts have broken off. There is a little cover that pops off over the fake control panel on buzzes wrist, the back part of the clear plastic helmet has broken off, and one of the elbow joints broke, so now his arm just hangs/wires are exposed. Definitely looks cool but is not worth $40. I would recommend going with something more durable if your child wants to actually play with the toy.

reviews.标题: Two purchased in a week neither work
reviews.评论: We have now purchased the same toy twice in one week and both of these items have delivered broken. None of the sounds work the laser pointer doesn’t glow absolutely unacceptable
I ordered buzz and woody together. Woody works fine but buzz will not work even after replacing batteries. Do better.

Bought one as gift… the battery had exploded and it did work. Returned the first, got a replacement… worked initially and left it with family member, then it died pretty much the next day. Attempted replacing the batteries but it still wouldn’t work. Now out of the return window and have a dolly that doesn’t do anything it says it should and a disappointed 4 year old niece.
The doll seemed good until I got it out of the package and the head was not attached!

reviews.标题: El producto NO CUMPLE SU FUNCIÓN
reviews.评论: El producto es pésimo, normalmente todos los buzz lightyear salen defectuosos, no cumplen con su función, no tienen sonido, el casco se queda trabado, las luces no prenden, etc, en mi opinión para lo que cuesta deberían de asegurarse de que el producto cumpla con su función!!.
Would he stop talking after 2 hours of use when you pull his string.
Toy is suppose to make galloping noise IT Doesn‘t. Should have returned it but it was too late. Not worth the money
Toy doesn‘t not have battery or doesn‘t work at all. It also seems to be missing a light or something
The string broke within a month
someone keeps leaving these all over my store. i love tossing them in the trash.
Some of them didn’t have any color on them and almost all we without the words on the banner
Does not show Jesus Loves U on sash
They are bigger then the original one I got. Some are color defective. Cut different bit strange.
They are bigger then the original one I got. Some are color defective. Cut different bit strange.

Some of the feet were breaking off of the Jesus figurines.  I don‘t expect super high quality from something so inexpensive and made in China but still it was disappointing especially since I was giving them away as gifts.
These are as cheap as they were cheap. One figure had no face, one the front and back didn‘t line up, one the legs and one hand have already fallen off and we just got them 2 days ago. Buy elsewhere.

reviews.标题: It‘s not A good representation of Jesus

reviews.标题: I do not recommend this product from this company.
reviews.评论: I was highly disappointed that more than 75% of the order was not usable as needed due to the fact the bottom of the figurines were not sealed properly.  There is a black/grey slightly sharp area on the bottom.  I am unable to use most of the figurines for the use they were intended.
There was no (Jesus ❤️ You ) on the sash on his garment.  Very disappointed.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Spider vs Energy Panther
reviews.标题: What a waste of money and plastic
reviews.评论: Ugh. 100% garbage!! Playtime was 10 mins and then boredom. I was going to return but he‘d already put everything together and that would feel like stealing and I‘m not teaching him that.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Lab-Bot vs GID Skeleton
reviews.标题: More of a collector item than a toy
reviews.评论: This Mr Beast Lab figurine set comes in a cool flask-style container and offers one of those “unboxing” for YouTube experience, especially for my 9-year-old daughter that wants to make this a profession. She loved the mystery of opening each pouch and describing it like she was being filmed. The mix-and-match figures are creative, although only two full figures were included out of the 15 total pieces—the rest are just arms and legs.The figures are poseable, you can swap all the parts anywhere… Like legs in an arm hole; arms in a leg hole…  The picture depicts a boy I would say was at least 11+ years old. The pieces do need some pressure to snap together so younger kids may need help attaching and detaching parts. I would say this is more for the Mr. Beast fan who wants to display these rather than “pla” with them.
I cannot recommend this product!  Two figures missing heads, 3 missing arms. Poor quality!
It seems they take some effort to put together in order to play with it.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Spider vs Energy Panther
reviews.评论: We received an open toy, no outer seal and the toys inside the beaker had all been opened as well rather than their individual packaging (loose in the beaker).  My son wanted the figures so took them anyway. However upon inspection we have two of the same wing.  It’s pretty clear we received a previously purchased, realized to be defective so returned by another customer, product.
One figure’s head won’t attach…..  disappointing to my little guy.

My grandson was so excited to get this.  But the novelty wore off quickly.  It would have added a little more fun if all of the pieces need to be washed off to reveal the colors and not just one.  And for the price, I think they could have done that.

reviews.标题: More for the Mr Beast fans or collectors
reviews.评论: This toy is more for the Mr Beast fans than it is a toy. It basically was fun to open to see what’s inside and put it together for a few minutes but after that it loses its charm. So if you are a Mr Beast fan or a collector this item is for you. If you are buying it as a toy not knowing Mr Beast then this isn’t for you.
Broke after one day.  Waste of money.  Poor quality
Sadly ours came missing one of their heads :(

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Spider vs Energy Panther
reviews.评论: After trying to help my children complete their smaller labs sets, I decided to give this a try as it seemed like a new concept that would keep their interest for a bit longer. While it has interchangeable parts, like a classic vegetable figure, they did not find this as fun and lost interest very quickly. The container is cool and is already being used to storage other items but they immediately lost interest in changing the pieces to make something new because, as others stated, not all of the parts attach securely. If your kids are collectors, I would recommend picking this set up. But, I believe you could get better value spending your money on other collectible items that are more durable and have more options.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Lab-Bot vs GID Skeleton
reviews.评论: These are such a fun idea and my son was so excited, but they came defective. The heads would not attach. It also came with two left arms for the gold beast instead of both sides. We have the other variety one and it was not defective like this one. They are fun toys, but just be aware that the functionality may be defective. It does make a great gift and is priced well if it is not defective.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Lab-Bot vs GID Skeleton
reviews.评论: While my kids did enjoy putting them together and rebuilding, they lost interest pretty quickly. They would need to have a large number f sets to keep then interested for a longer period of time. One of the leg pieces was defective so it wouldn’t move. I don’t necessarily feel that this is a very good value. For the right kid it may be fine, jut not best for mine.

Mr. Beast is a huge thing in our house so when I saw this I knew I had to get it for my 11 y/o. It seems of decent quality and he was very excited to open it but to me it has the same look, feel and size to a Golden Arches Happy Meal toy. In a week he’ll forget about it and I’ll probably dispose of it or donate it. I was expecting something larger and more interactive I guess but maybe that’s my bad for expecting too much. Of my own volition I would not purchase one of these mystery toys again as I don’t personally feel it’s worth the money but it did make my son super happy so 3 stars it is.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Spider vs Energy Panther
reviews.标题: Hopefully this is a good collectible
reviews.评论: Pros:Bright colors and creative designIncludes multiple mix-and-match partsCons:Plastic parts feel cheap and fragilePieces do not stay connected firmlyLimited play value once the novelty wears offPackaging is difficult to open cleanly

reviews.标题: Seems like a cool collectible ..but my kids have zero intrest.
reviews.评论: I have 2 kids, 16 and 11.My 16 year old said “this is booty, who really want‘s a Mr Beast toy, how much was this?“My 11 year old after it was assembled wanted nothing to do with it.The toy overall outside of the “Beast“ branding seems ok, but the brand did not justify collecting or using the toy.Seems like something you may get inside of a Happy Meal.

The bottle it comes in is cool. If you were going to wrap it then it would be difficult to wrap. The toy itself is true how it was advertised but seems small when you see the cool bottle it comes in. The price is average for these kinds of figures. I’ve paid more for comic brand names but I’ve paid less for off brand and I would have classified this as off brand. The product seems sturdy. Overall it’s ok.

reviews.评论产品的属性: Style=2 Pack - Lab-Bot vs GID Skeleton
reviews.评论: This is a review for this specific Mr. Beast Lab figurine set, NOT for his Tik Tok or YouTube videos.Clever “lab flask” packaging for creative play time. Two complete figures, one partial figure. 15 pieces. Part of a larger “collectible” collection of 30 different figures.Positives: 1) clever packaging 2) playable, pose able action figures 3) ability to mix and match pieces 4) ability to expand the collection for interactive play or collecting 5) Our 7 year old loved playing with these.Opportunities: 1) only two complete figures feels like poor value. 2) Some pieces were hard to release. 3) small pieces tend to mean lots of opportunity for losing them. Especially for younger children.Recommendation? Neutral. If your child is interested in these figures, and willing to spend the money to collect more (or receive as gifts in the future) then there is definitely more fun to be had. We ultimately felt like the partial figure, and small number of total pieces would quickly lead to requests for more. Which proved correct.

I found these figures pretty frustrating, especially considering the price point. You get five 4-inch figures with mix-and-match parts, which breaks down to about $10 a figure. I had trouble with the larger, multi-armed figure keeping his head and limbs attached.The figures come in a giant plastic beaker. You‘re supposed to fill it with water to wash off the paint that coats some (but not all) of the figures. This part can get messy, so I’d definitely recommend doing it outside, especially if you have younger kids. Make sure to rinse the figures thoroughly. Paint gets stuck in all the little crevices and could stain your stuff if you don‘t fully wash the figures.The beaker itself is bulky and can get heavy if you fill it too high. It completely dwarfs the figures and after you‘ve dumped out the paint-colored water, I’m not sure how reusable or fun it really is. It feels like it’s just extra plastic headed for the bin. I suppose you could use it to store Beast figures if your child has a collection going. It won‘t stack on a shelf but it can fit a good number of these little guys.Some of the figure designs do look cool and they have decent articulation. I just found the experience underwhelming for the price point.
Not worth the price, thought it would do more. The voices on it has a British accent.. I don’t understand why they did that

Fun toy but my daughter is pretty disappointed that it doesn’t actually sound like the Paw Patrol characters. All of the voices have a British accent, for whatever reason? Very odd. I wish they would have advertised that. The voice definitely does not match the one in the advertisement.

Easy to put together, and my daughters love it. Did not come with the zipline clips so instead of taking it apart and exchanging it i had to spend 45 extra dollars on 3D replacements, very annoying especially with the high price tag.

So my son is pretty pumped on the toy itself but I am displeased that for $150 they didn’t include all the characters. I didn’t realize this so you only get Chase, Sky, Marshall and ruble. It’s missing Everest and Zuma. Like really? You can’t just do all 5 of the pups, especially for this price?
Missing Chase figure and car.

Skye doesn’t clip on the zip line as shown. None of them do.Kids love to play with it, but buyers should be aware it has several flaws.Not a huge deal but the voices are British 🤣The part where Chase pops through the doors is clunky for little hands as well. Often the car won’t stay in the doors.I usually have to put strings or elastics on the animals so the kids can actually use them on the zip line part. They get very frustrated when they get stuck or can’t do it themselves.Very involved assembly.Just letting others know as it’s a pricey toy for what it is.The kids love It so that’s why i got it.

reviews.标题: Why didn‘t you add the vehicles for the remaining Paw Patrol characters
reviews.评论: I love the entire gift set. But you would think for $135+ dollars. They would have at least added all the vehicles for the remaining Paw Patrol characters...?

reviews.标题: Quality Is Decent, But Not What I Expected
reviews.评论: The quality is decent, but unfortunately, it‘s not exactly what I was looking for...

not quite sure why this is over $100, it doesn’t do much, the doors to the garage don’t even open, and the paw patrol voices are in British accents. In comparison, the paw patrol aircraft carrier is like 1/4 of price and does five different functions makes noises and comes with a bunch of extra toys.

Easy to set up but the electronics do not work! Changed the batteries multiple times and it just will not light up or make sounds. Highly disappointed for what I paid for it. Would return but it is never going to fit in the box again. If you want to run the risk of the electronics working then order it.
Damaged box and item inside was broken and cracked through. Disappointing as this was my son’s birthday present. Must have been a return that was not checked for quality before sending out again
Missing pieces, just get it new. SO ANNOYED
missing *all* paw patrol characters and audio has a british accent lol

reviews.标题: Damaged box, but  not the shipping box.
reviews.评论: The box was damaged but the shipping box wasn’t.  This is a birthday gift for my grandson. I don’t have time to return it now. I guess I’ll see if the parts are damaged after he opens it.
